emails.subject: Randy Gay's Wife
emails.body: Randy Gay's Wife Just in case you did not know, Randy's wife died last week. They will be having services today and tomorrow. However, in lieu of flowers they would like donations for a playground in their neighborhood. If you want to give a donation, please bring it by my desk. Thanks Kimberly
